subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful servant! Give thanks unto God that thou art a devoted helper in harmony with the friends, and art resplendent and radiant with the light of servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق شکر کن خدا را که خادم یاران موافقی و بنور عبودیت بارق و شارق اگر
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
